Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6A00 "THEPYRAMID-6A00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pyramid, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Note: as the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $68EC.
The loading screen was converted from the Spectrum version by Andy Green (https://www.facebook.com/AndyGreenPixelArt).
